name: Virtual Machine High Privilege Role Assigned
notes:
This rule adds the Machine ID (of the virtual machine) to the reference set "Resources with High Privilege Roles" if it was assigned a high privilege role.

Note: The Low Privilege Role Names reference set must be populated with the relevant role names. Anything not defined in this Reference Set is considered as suspicious in terms of privileges.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Cloud, BB:DeviceDefinition: Virtualization
when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.Role Assignment Success
when the event matches Machine Identifier (custom) is not N/A
when any of Role Name (custom) are contained in any of Low Privilege Role Names - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY Virtual Machine High Privilege Role Assigned on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Cloud, BB:DeviceDefinition: Virtualization
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.Role Assignment Success
AND when the event matches Machine Identifier (custom) is not N/A
AND NOT when any of Role Name (custom) are contained in any of Low Privilege Role Names - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Add the "Machine Identifier" of the event or flow payload to the Reference Set "Resources with High Privilege Roles"
